The '''assault of the Aturi Cluster''' was a battle fought during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] resulting in a defeat for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces by the [[Scimitar assault wing]].

==History==
The [[Aturi Cluster/Legends|Aturi Cluster]] had possessed a notable [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] presence, large enough that it warranted a full-scale assault by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. The Rebels had set up powerful system of [[Anti-aircraft weaponry|anti-atmospheric defenses]] however, which forced the [[Scimitar assault wing]] to come up with and utilize a new tactic developed by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tomax Bren/Legends|Tomax Bren]]. Dubbed the [[Vertical Swoop]], this maneuver proved very useful against the network of ground-based defenses.<ref name="ISB" />
